completed_tasks.name: S17-18: Li criterion decomposed (Gamma+zeta), N_0=11, tau_n monotone
S19: Gamma positivity proved (n>=8), zeta bound = RH
S19-20: Connes scaffolding — W_02 exact, W_p exact, W_R series (approx)
S20: xi_hat diagnostic — zeros not yet distinguishable from random
S18: Avenue 4 DEAD END, B-L comparison done

remaining_tasks.name: Read arxiv:2511.22755 Prop 4.2 for exact W_R with 2F1+digamma
Implement exact W_R in mpmath at 200dp, reproduce zero matching
Write Li criterion preprint (decomposition, N_0, oscillation)

blockers.blocker: Connes W_R needs Prop 4.2 exact formula — not fully extractable from HTML abstract

human_actions_pending.action: Download arxiv:2511.22755 PDF to extract Proposition 4.2 formulas precisely

decisions.decision: Connes framework structurally correct but quantitatively needs exact W_R
decisions.rationale: W_02 (eq 4.2) and W_p (eq 4.3) verified. W_R series converges but doesn't match paper's result. The paper's Prop 4.2 uses specific 2F1 hypergeometric + digamma combinations that aren't fully captured by our regularized integral.

decisions.decision: Li criterion investigation is COMPLETE — all avenues explored to their natural endpoint
decisions.rationale: Gamma positivity proved, zeta bound shown equivalent to RH, truncated Euler product dead end, B-L comparison done. Clean results worthy of documentation.

next_action: Either (1) download the actual PDF of arxiv:2511.22755 to get exact Prop 4.2, or (2) pivot to writing the Li criterion preprint. The Connes implementation is blocked on the precise W_R formula.
context_notes: 14 scripts total. Li (10): li_criterion.py through li_zeta_bound.py. Connes (4): connes_weil.py, connes_spectral.py, connes_exact.py, connes_v2.py. Key results: g_k = (-1)^k*[(1-2^{-k})*zeta(k)-1]/k, N_0=11, tau_n monotone. Connes: W02 = 32L*sinh^2(L/4)*..., xi_hat(z) = 2/sqrt(L)*sin(zL/2)*sum xi_j/(z-2pi*j/L). Python: /c/Python313/python.exe.
